payload.additional_notes: Large bed with striped bedding dominates foreground. Two dressers visible (center and right). Nightstand with table lamp on left.
payload.image_summary: A tidy traditional bedroom with a large bed in the foreground, two windows with blinds and dark curtains centered on the back wall, dark wood dressers including a TV on the right dresser, a ceiling fan with light, and laundry baskets near the right wall.
